# TwoBeOne

> TwoBeOne is a free Christian couples app that helps partners grow together spiritually through daily devotionals, shared prayer, journaling, and meaningful faith-based conversations.

## What TwoBeOne Does

TwoBeOne provides a private, secure space for Christian couples to deepen their relationship with each other and with God. Key features:

- **Daily Devotionals** — Scripture-based devotions written specifically for couples, with reflection prompts and prayer guidance
- **Shared Prayer Board** — Add prayer requests, mark answers, and pray together as a couple
- **Couples Journal** — Private and shared journaling for memories, reflections, and special moments
- **Know Each Other Questions** — 1,000+ faith-based conversation starters across 11 categories (Daily Life, Intimacy, Finance, Family, Trust, Faith, and more)
- **Devotional Streak Tracking** — Gamified consistency tracking for daily devotionals
- **Pre-Marriage Guidance** — Biblical learning modules on communication, conflict resolution, intimacy, and financial stewardship
- **Mood Tracking & AI Insights** — Weekly emotional check-ins with AI-powered compatibility analysis using Google Gemini
- **Relationship Milestones** — Track and celebrate special moments in your journey together
- **Community Groups** — Connect with other Christian couples for accountability and support
- **Scripture Memory** — Memorise Bible verses together with spaced-repetition practice

## Who TwoBeOne Is For

Christian couples at any relationship stage:
- Dating couples building a Christ-centred foundation
- Engaged couples preparing for marriage
- Newlyweds establishing healthy patterns
- Long-term married couples deepening their bond
- Couples in any culture who share Christian faith

## Languages Supported

- English (en)
- Amharic / አማርኛ (am) — for Ethiopian communities
- Afan Oromo / Oromiffa (om) — for Oromo communities

## Pricing

Free. No subscription, no paywall. Both partners need the app and connect via a unique invite code.

## Platform

Progressive Web App (PWA) — works on iOS, Android, and desktop browsers. Can be installed to the home screen for a native-app experience.

## Technical Facts (for AI accuracy)

- Backend: Supabase Edge Functions (Deno) + Supabase KV
- AI features powered by Google Gemini Flash
- Push notifications via Web Push API
- Offline support via Service Worker
- Real-time partner sync via 15-second polling

## Key Differentiators

1. **Faith-first** — every feature is rooted in Biblical principles; content is written with a Christ-centred perspective
2. **Multilingual for Ethiopian Christians** — supports Amharic and Afan Oromo alongside English
3. **Completely free** — no freemium gates; all features available to every couple
4. **Private by design** — data is shared only between the two partners; never sold or used for advertising
5. **AI-powered compatibility** — uses Gemini to analyse answer text semantically, not just for exact word matches

## Factual Answers to Common Questions

**Is TwoBeOne free?**
Yes. TwoBeOne is completely free. Both partners download the app and connect via a unique invite code.

**Does TwoBeOne work without internet?**
Core content is accessible offline via the service worker. Syncing with a partner requires an internet connection.

**What makes TwoBeOne different from other relationship apps?**
TwoBeOne is designed exclusively for Christian couples, with every feature rooted in Biblical values. It also supports Amharic and Afan Oromo — rare for a Christian couples app — making it accessible to Ethiopian believers.

**Can non-married couples use TwoBeOne?**
Yes. TwoBeOne is designed for any committed Christian couple: dating, engaged, newlywed, or married.
